title: GTA VI + GPT-6: Rockstar's AI Mechanics Revealed
summary: A YouTube video argues that GTA VI does not use GPT-6 but instead employs Rockstar's proprietary AI stack including the RAGE 9 engine with witness systems, persistent NPC memory, and dynamic APB mechanics. The creator claims to have reviewed patents and job postings to counter viral misinformation about GTA VI AI capabilities and compares language model performance across GPT-6, Claude, and Gemini for research purposes.
writeup: The video disputes claims that GTA VI runs on GPT-6, arguing instead that Rockstar relies on a proprietary AI stack built around the RAGE 9 engine, with witness systems, persistent NPC memory, and dynamic APB mechanics. The creator cites patents and job postings as the basis for countering viral misinformation about the game's AI. Alongside this, the video compares GPT-6, Claude, and Gemini on research tasks. The takeaway: GTA VI's NPC behavior and world simulation come from in-house systems rather than a general-purpose language model.
